title: I needed a glass mod
description: A very simple mod that adds translucent colored blocks.
body:
# I needed a glass mod
### A very simple mod based around futuristic base building.
---
I was playing a modpack and wanted to build a cool base. Sadly, nobody had anything like I wanted for 1.20.1. So, I took matters into my own hands...

This mod primarily adds Semiblocks! They are translucent blocks that are colored, they come in every dye color, and have illuminated variants.

Version 1.1.0, released April 29th, 2025, adds recipes. You can use KubeJS to remove or modify recipes for your modpack.

This mod was made in MCreator!
